Lucida Photography, operated by Melia Lucida and established in 2004, specializes in Vancouver wedding photography. Their portfolio showcases elegant ceremonies and receptions at diverse venues, from seaside restaurants to mountain lodges. They also offer engagement sessions and custom albums to complement your wedding day coverage.
